headline: 20 Years on Wall Street Taught Me: Big Dividend Healthcare Stocks Never Go Out of Style
summary: After a career spanning two decades at Bear Stearns, Lehman Brothers, and Morgan Stanley, I gained an institutional perspective on dividend stock investing. My tenure at these premier Wall Street firms exposed me to fundamental analysis, credit evaluation, and risk management practices that directly translate into selecting high-quality dividend-paying companies.
